title: Pomodoro Technique
description: A method of studying for 25 minutes followed by a 5-minute break to improve focus and reduce fatigue.

title: Feynman Technique
description: A way to learn a difficult subject by explaining it simply to someone else to deepen your own understanding.

title: Active Recall
description: Closing your book after reading and trying to answer questions or recall the information from memory.

title: Eisenhower Matrix
description: A method for setting priorities by dividing tasks into four categories based on importance and urgency.

title: Eat the Frog
description: The habit of finishing the most difficult and important task of the day first.

title: Time Blocking
description: Assigning specific tasks to every hour of the day to ensure time is not wasted.
